publication.gate_value: sha256(source-release-review-v2: source inputs plus four reviewed wheelhouse digests; see review_digest.py)

included_source_materials: UCI Grabber Maia3 build and packaging definitions
not_bundled_as_source: PyInstaller 6.21.0 bootloader and other reviewed wheel dependencies

required_written_review: Classify each frozen dependency as Corresponding Source, a separate aggregated work, or an applicable System Library/exclusion.
Require additional exact source archives or durable source offers whenever the classification demands them.
Confirm the release notices and source/build bundle satisfy the obligations for every distributed runtime platform.
Repeat review whenever any source-review-v1 input or reviewed wheelhouse changes.
